sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4709" key="a)lu/mantos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλύμαντος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῡ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n4709.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unhurt, unimpaired,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5e</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:11:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
